title: November 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 16''' is the 320th day of the year (321st in leap years), with 45 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Juan Giménez]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Troy Hall]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 68|''Star Wars'' (1977) 68]] released.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 22|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 22]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[The Roon Games]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] and "[[The Three Lessons]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'']] air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 126|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 126]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars: Demolition: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 57|''Star Wars Insider'' 57]] released for subscribers.
*2001 – [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]] published at newsstands.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Robot Chicken: Star Wars Episode II]]'' premieres on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2011]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 5|''Invasion: Revelations'' 5]] published.
*2011 – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 4|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 4]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil (audiobook)|''Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil'' audiobook]] released.
*2021 – ''[[The Mandalorian Crochet]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures, Volume One]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Graphic Novel Adaptation Box Set]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 26|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 26]] published.
*2022 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 7|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 7]] published.
*2022 – [[Hidden Empire 1|''Hidden Empire'' 1]] published.
*2022 – "[[Daughter of Ferrix]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released.
*2022 – [[David Sherman]] dies.
<noinclude>
